events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the torque sequence violation (bolts tightened out of the OEM spiral/star pattern) is flagged as a **fail**, high risk, since it causes uneven clamping load and joint distortion. Required corrective path: stop, fully loosen the affected fasteners, re-torque per the correct multi-pass spiral/star sequence, verify with a calibrated wrench, and get QA sign-off before continuing.
